Last year at the ER, I had an MRI to check my gallbladder, which needed to be removed. I requested my medical records and found that the radiologist noted I had ovarian cysts and my IUD
http://localhost:9999/f/LifeProTips/1203.title: r/LifeProTips: LPT: Always request copies of your medical records after an ER visit or hospital stay, especially where they do tests/imaging. If something important shows up unrelated to your visit, they won't always tell you, but will put it in your chart.
